snippet: This communication concerns aggregate financial position. Aggregate band-4 payroll commitment: £153,000 per annum. Further detail will be shared through the usual team briefings over the coming days. Line managers will cascade the practical details relevant to each team. The effective date and version of this communication are shown in the footer. This notice applies to all staff across both distribution sites and takes effect immediately. The arrangements described here will
title: Notice: aggregate financial position
